final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [7:0] data,
    output reg [7:0] q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset)
            q <= 8'b00000000;
        else if (load)
            q <= data;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
